{{Quote|Good afternoon, worthy citizens. I am C-5MO, Human-cyborg relations. May I assist you in your selection?|C-5MO|<ref name="Vision of the Future">''[[Vision of the Future]]''</ref>}}
'''C-5MO''' was a silver [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] that served as a clerk in a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] shop on the [[Imperial Remnant]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]]. When trying to escape [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces, C-5MO gave [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] permission to use several [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droids]] to transmit multitonal signals to jam Imperial frequencies.

==Appearances==
